title: Eyelid Disorders
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Blepharitis can make eyelids red, itchy, or burning and can cause crusty eyelashes.
Stye, chalazion, blepharitis, and periorbital cellulitis are distinct eyelid problems.
Orbital cellulitis requires immediate medical care if infection spreads behind the eye.
